title: 回复 MOQ、样品和交期
theme: 从 MOQ / sample cost / lead time 开始
goals: 能解释 MOQ、样品费和交期，不让回复显得生硬
客户想少量下单时，能给出可执行的替代方案
能在确认规格后，把报价、样品和生产时间自然连接起来

review.title: Day 02 复习
items: 昨天练了确认 quantity、color、size、material 和 specification。
今天继续练确认后的下一步：MOQ、样品、交期和付款前信息。
客户问价格时，不只给价格，还要说明 MOQ、样品费和生产时间。

preview.scenario: 客户已经提供基本规格，现在开始追问最小起订量、样品费用、样品时间和大货交期。
needToKnow: MOQ 是 minimum order quantity，回复时要说明数量和原因。
sample cost 不只是样品价格，还可能包含 logo、模具或快递费用。
lead time 要区分 sample lead time 和 bulk production lead time。

vocabulary.usage: 说明工厂可接受的最低订单数量。
vocabulary.example: Our MOQ for this item is 1,000 pieces.

vocabulary.usage: 客户想少量下单时，用来说明是否有现货可卖。
vocabulary.example: I can check if we have available stock for you.

vocabulary.usage: 说明样品本身费用，不一定包含运费。
vocabulary.example: The sample cost is 50 dollars, excluding shipping cost.

vocabulary.usage: 说明样品或大货需要多少时间完成。
vocabulary.example: The production lead time is about 20 days after payment.

vocabulary.usage: 用于大货生产、生产时间和生产安排。
vocabulary.example: We will start production after confirming the payment.

vocabulary.usage: 说明快递、空运或海运费用。
vocabulary.example: Please confirm your address so we can check the shipping cost.

vocabulary.usage: 说明带 logo、特殊颜色、特殊包装等定制要求。
vocabulary.example: For customized logo, the MOQ may be higher.

vocabulary.usage: 用于样品确认通过后，再安排大货生产。
vocabulary.example: We will arrange bulk production after sample approval.

sentences.label: 说明 MOQ
sentences.natural: Our MOQ for this item is 1,000 pieces.
sentences.business: For this item, our MOQ is 1,000 pieces because the factory needs to arrange production materials.

sentences.label: 客户想少量
sentences.natural: A smaller quantity may be difficult for production.
sentences.business: A smaller quantity may be difficult for production, but I can check if we have any available stock for you.

sentences.label: 说明样品费
sentences.business: The sample cost is 50 dollars, excluding shipping cost. I can check the shipping cost after you confirm the delivery address.

sentences.label: 说明样品时间
sentences.natural: The sample lead time is about 7 days.
sentences.business: The sample lead time is about 7 days after we confirm the sample details and payment.

sentences.label: 说明大货交期
sentences.natural: The production lead time is about 20 days.
sentences.business: The bulk production lead time is about 20 days after sample approval and deposit payment.

chatAnalysis.problem: 太短，客户不知道这是规则、建议还是最终限制。
chatAnalysis.upgrade: For this item, our MOQ is 1,000 pieces. If you need a smaller quantity, I can check available stock for you.

chatAnalysis.problem: 语气直接，容易让客户觉得不友好。
chatAnalysis.better: The sample is not free for this item.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: For this customized item, there is a sample cost. I can confirm the exact sample cost and shipping cost for you.

chatAnalysis.problem: delivery 容易被理解成运输时间，不等于生产交期。
chatAnalysis.better: The production lead time is about 20 days.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: The bulk production lead time is about 20 days after sample approval and deposit payment.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：客户问 MOQ

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What is the MOQ for this item?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Our MOQ for this item is 1,000 pieces.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can we order 500 pieces first?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Let me check if we have available stock for a smaller quantity.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：客户问样品和运费

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you arrange a sample first?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. The sample cost is 50 dollars, excluding shipping cost.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: How can you check the shipping cost?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Please confirm your delivery address, and I will check the shipping cost for you.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：客户催交期

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you finish production in 10 days?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: For this customized order, 10 days may be difficult.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We really need it urgently.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. I will check the fastest lead time with our factory and update you today.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：从 MOQ 到样品、交期和付款前确认

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Hi, we like this product. What is the MOQ?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: For this item, our MOQ is 1,000 pieces.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can we order 500 pieces for the first order?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: A smaller quantity may be difficult for production, but I can check available stock for you.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: If you have stock, can we use our logo?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: If it is stock, the logo option may be limited. For customized logo, the MOQ may be higher.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What is the MOQ for customized logo?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: For customized logo, the MOQ is usually 1,000 pieces. Let me confirm the exact requirement with our factory.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can we make a sample with our logo first?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, we can arrange a customized sample first.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: How much is the sample cost?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The sample cost is 50 dollars, excluding shipping cost.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Does the sample cost include logo printing?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: For a simple logo, it can include logo printing. If the logo process is complex, I need to confirm the cost again.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: How long does the sample take?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The sample lead time is about 7 days after we confirm the sample details and payment.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you make it faster?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I can check the fastest sample lead time with our factory, but we need to confirm the logo file first.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We can send the logo file today.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Great. Please send the logo file in AI or PDF format if possible.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: After sample approval, how long is bulk production?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The bulk production lead time is about 20 days after sample approval and deposit payment.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you ship by air if we need it urgently?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, we can check air shipping, but the shipping cost will be higher than sea shipping.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please check the total cost for sample and shipping.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Please confirm your delivery address, and I will check the sample cost and shipping cost together.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Do you need anything else from us?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes. Please confirm the quantity, logo file, color, delivery address, and preferred shipping method.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay, I will send all details soon.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. After receiving the details, I will prepare the sample quotation and update you today.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：这个产品的最小起订量是 1000 件。
exercises.answer: Our MOQ for this item is 1,000 pieces.
acceptable: our moq for this item is 1000 pieces
the moq for this item is 1000 pieces
our minimum order quantity for this item is 1000 pieces

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更自然：sample cost not free
exercises.answer: There is a sample cost for this item.
acceptable: there is a sample cost for this item
the sample is not free for this item
for this item there is a sample cost
exercises.hint: 不要直接说 not free，可以说 there is a sample cost。

exercises.prompt: 填空：The production ____ time is about 20 days after deposit payment.
exercises.hint: lead time 表示交期或生产周期。

exercises.prompt: 客户问 Can we order 500 pieces first? 哪个回复更适合？
options: A smaller quantity may be difficult, but I can check available stock for you.
exercises.answer: A smaller quantity may be difficult, but I can check available stock for you.
acceptable: a smaller quantity may be difficult but i can check available stock for you
exercises.hint: 先解释困难，再给替代方案。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：请确认收货地址，我来帮你查运费。
exercises.answer: Please confirm your delivery address, and I will check the shipping cost for you.
acceptable: please confirm your delivery address and i will check the shipping cost for you
please confirm the delivery address and i will check the shipping cost for you

exercises.prompt: 客户说：Can you finish production in 10 days? 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: For this customized order, 10 days may be difficult. I will check the fastest lead time with our factory and update you today.
acceptable: 10 days may be difficult i will check the fastest lead time with our factory and update you today
for this customized order 10 days may be difficult i will check the fastest lead time with our factory
i will check the fastest lead time with our factory and update you today
exercises.hint: 不要直接拒绝，说明困难并承诺确认最快交期。

homework: 把 MOQ、sample cost、lead time、shipping cost 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍。
跟读长对话 2 遍，重点练客户要求少量下单和催交期的回复。
tomorrow: Day 4 会练报价单、付款方式和 PI 的表达。
